verdict: T1.3 sign-ID audit: M77 corpus has 64 distinct signs (5361 tokens). Phoneme map has 33 entries. Direct ID overlap = 2; via crosswalk = 2; UNION = 2. Phoneme coverage of M77 token frequency = 10.18%. This confirms the Phase-30a A8 finding: even with proper sign-ID alignment, only 2 signs in the M77 corpus have a phoneme reading. Phase-30a A8 cannot be meaningfully re-run until the phoneme map expands to cover more M77 corpus signs (P30-B2 Wells 2015 + P30-D1/D2 Wells/Fuls cross-cluster).
